hero_subtitle: Master French or Spanish with native teachers through interactive, cultural immersion designed for young adults.
french_description: Experience the language of art, culture, and love with authentic French immersion
spanish_description: Dive into vibrant Spanish culture with immersive lessons and real conversation practice

features.title: Interactive Learning
features.text: Games, role-plays, and modern teaching methods that make learning fun and engaging for young adults.

features.title: Young Community
features.text: Join a community of young learners, participate in social events, and make friends while learning.

features.title: Modern Platform
features.text: Access lessons on any device with our sleek, intuitive platform designed for the digital generation.

features.title: Cultural Immersion
features.text: Learn through music, films, and cultural content that resonates with young adults worldwide.

cta_title: Ready to Speak Like a Local?
cta_text: Join thousands of young adults who are transforming their language skills with YoLingo.
